options.name: --severity
options.description:
The minimum severity of the diagnostics to report. Can be
Hidden, Info or Warning. Default is Hidden.

arguments.name: sourcepath
arguments.description:
Path to the .sln/.slnf/.slnx/.csproj file to load and 
analyze.

arguments.name: outputpath
arguments.description:
Path to the .html/.json/.csv file to save the analysis 
into.
